svg.title: NayePankh Saathi GitHub banner
svg.desc: Professional GitHub repository banner for NayePankh Saathi — Empowering Communities Through AI. Deep navy background with orange accents, showing education, food, and women's health themes.

g.text: Built with Next.js • Gemini API • TypeScript • Vercel
